channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STERPOW] Promoter Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi Sells 0.02% Shares of Sterling Powergensys Ltd via Market Sale
item.description:
Promoter Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi of Sterling Powergensys Ltd sold 967 shares (0.02%) of the company via a market sale on the BSE Limited. The total holding of Mr. Sanghvi now stands at 3.38% of the diluted share/voting capital of the company.

  • Promoter Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi sells 0.02% shares of Sterling Powergensys Ltd.
  • The shares were sold via a market sale on the BSE Limited.
  • The total holding of Mr. Sanghvi now stands at 3.38% of the diluted share/voting capital of the company.
  • The sale was made on 24-03-2026 and reported on 25-03-2026.
  • The total number of shares sold is 967.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling Powergensys Limited | Category: Sale

item.title: [RELAXO] Relaxo Footwears Ltd: Ritesh Dua and Gaurav Kumaar Dua Re-Designated as Co-Chief Executive Officers
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Relaxo Footwears Ltd has announced the re-designation of Mr. Ritesh Dua, Executive Vice President (Finance), as Co-Chief Executive Officer (Co-CEO) and Mr. Gaurav Kumaar Dua, Whole time Director, as Co-Chief Executive Officer & Whole-time Director (Co- CEO & WTD) of the Company, effective April 1, 2026. Both individuals will continue to receive their existing remuneration, with no changes to their tenure or other terms and conditions of their appointments, which were approved by the shareholders at the AGM held on August 24, 2023, for a period of 3 years from October 1, 2023, to September 30, 2026.

  • Mr. Ritesh Dua re-designated as Co-Chief Executive Officer (Co-CEO) of Relaxo Footwears Ltd.
  • Mr. Gaurav Kumaar Dua re-designated as Co-Chief Executive Officer & Whole-time Director (Co- CEO & WTD) of the Company.
  • Their appointments will take effect on April 1, 2026.
  • Their remuneration, tenure, and other terms and conditions of their appointments remain unchanged.
  • Their appointments were approved by the shareholders at the AGM held on August 24, 2023, for a period of 3 years from October 1, 2023, to September 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELAXO FOOTWEARS LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PARMESHWAR] Parmeshwar Metal Ltd Receives Order from GST Authority, Gujarat - Demand of Rs. 3.43 Crore Tax with Penalties
item.description:
Parmeshwar Metal Ltd has received an Order from the GST Authority, Gujarat on March 26, 2026, confirming a demand of tax of Rs. 3.43 Crore along with applicable interest and penalties of Rs. 7.44 Crore under the Central Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017 (‘CGST Act, 2017’) / the Gujarat Goods and Service Tax Act, 2017 (‘GJGST Act, 2017’). The issue pertains to alleged inadmissible ITC received from non-existent suppliers / tax defaulters. The Company is taking appropriate steps to file an appeal before the Appellate Authority against the Order issued by the Adjudicating Authority. The Company believes that the demand is without merits and is expected to be set aside during the appellate proceedings. The Company does not foresee any material impact on financial or operational or other activities of the Company.

  • Parmeshwar Metal Ltd received an Order from GST Authority, Gujarat on March 26, 2026.
  • The Order confirms a demand of tax of Rs. 3.43 Crore along with applicable interest and penalties of Rs. 7.44 Crore under the CGST Act, 2017 and GJGST Act, 2017.
  • The issue pertains to alleged inadmissible ITC received from non-existent suppliers / tax defaulters.
  • The Company is taking appropriate steps to file an appeal before the Appellate Authority against the Order issued by the Adjudicating Authority.
  • The Company believes that the demand is without merits and is expected to be set aside during the appellate proceedings, and does not foresee any material impact on financial or operational or other activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Parmeshwar Metal Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [KENRIK] Kenrik Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Kenrik Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives. This closure is in accordance with the code of conduct and provisions of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board meeting for the consideration and declaration of these results will be intimated in due course.

  • Kenrik Industries Ltd closes trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026
  • Date of Board meeting for consideration and declaration of audited financial results to be announced later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kenrik Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STERPOW] Sterling Powergensys Ltd: Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi Sells 17929 Shares
item.description:
Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi, a significant shareholder of Sterling Powergensys Ltd, has sold 17929 equity shares of the company. This disclosure was made in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The sale took place on the BSE Limited on 25th March 2026.

  • Pradeep Gorakhchand Sanghvi sells 17929 shares of Sterling Powergensys Ltd.
  • The sale was made on the BSE Limited on 25th March 2026.
  • The shares sold were equity shares of Rs.10/- each.
  • The sale was made in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The sale reduced Mr. Sanghvi's holding from 3.38% to 3.04%.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling Powergensys Limited | Category: Sale

item.title: [NILASPACES] Nila Spaces Ltd Closes Trading Window for Approval of Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Nila Spaces Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company. The closure is from April 0L,2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31,2026. This move is due to the approval of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 37,2026. Designated Persons of the company are advised not to deal in the securities of the company during the trading window closure period. Insiders are requested to abide by the 'Code of Conduct of the Company for Insider Trading'.

  • Nila Spaces Ltd closes trading window for approval of audited financial results.
  • Trading window closure from April 0L,2026 till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.
  • Closure due to approval of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 37,2026.
  • Designated Persons advised not to deal in the securities of the company during the closure period.
  • Insiders requested to abide by the 'Code of Conduct of the Company for Insider Trading'.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nila Spaces Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHARDFI] Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons, including their immediate relatives and those with whom they share material financial relationships. The closure is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Code of Conduct for prevention of Insider Trading. The trading window will remain closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Eco Hotels And Resorts Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Trading window to close from April 01, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Announcement affects designated persons, their immediate relatives, and those with whom they share material financial relationships

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHARAD FIBRES & YARN PROCESSORS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SHRIGANG] Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Shri Gang Industries & Allied Products Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the securities of the company for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from April 01, 2026, in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the meeting of the Board of Directors to approve the Audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives to close from April 01, 2026
  • Closure in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Date of the meeting of the Board of Directors to approve the Audited financial results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHRI GANG INDUSTRIES AND ALLIED PRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DEEPAKFERT] Deepak Fertilisers & Petrochemicals Corporation Ltd Closes Trading Window
item.description:
Deepak Fertilisers & Petrochemicals Corporation Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in securities of the company. This closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and will affect all designated persons (including their immediate relatives). The trading window will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026.

  • Trading window closure for Deepak Fertilisers & Petrochemicals Corporation Ltd
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Affects all designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after declaration of audited financial results for the year ending 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DEEPAK FERTILISERS & PETROCHEMICALS CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HALDER] Halder Venture Ltd. Addresses Non-Compliance Fine by BSE for Q4 2025, Now Fully Compliant
item.description:
Halder Venture Ltd. has addressed a fine imposed by the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE) for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, pertaining to the composition of the Board for the quarter ended December 2025. The company was non-compliant for 44 days, from 1st October 2025 to 13th November 2025. The Board has now confirmed compliance and advised caution in future adherence to Listing Regulations. The company is also non-compliant with other regulations, with fines prescribed accordingly.

  • Halder Venture Ltd. addressed a fine imposed by the BSE for non-compliance with Regulation 17(1) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • The company was non-compliant for 44 days, from 1st October 2025 to 13th November 2025.
  • The Board has now confirmed compliance and advised caution in future adherence to Listing Regulations.
  • The company is also non-compliant with other regulations, with fines prescribed accordingly.
  • Halder Venture Ltd. remains committed to strong governance and regulatory adherence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Halder Venture Ltd | Category: Legal
